commit.message:
feat: Wake Lock API — keep screen on during processing

Acquires navigator.wakeLock.request('screen') whenever any tool is
processing. This prevents the device from sleeping and the browser
from suspending network activity mid-upload/compression.

- Watches all processing states (compress, GIF, trim, watermark,
  speed, remove audio, extract audio, bulk, cartoon)
- Re-acquires lock on visibilitychange if user briefly switches apps
  and comes back while still processing
- Releases automatically when processing completes
- Silently no-ops on browsers that don't support Wake Lock API

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Camel JSON parse error caused by unescaped quotes in dish names

Claude sometimes wraps dish names in ASCII double-quotes (e.g. "Camel"),
which breaks JSON parsing. Instruct Claude to never use quotes in names.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

chore: incremental BA only optimizes current frame

Modified RunBundleAdjustment to support two optimization modes:
- Incremental mode: only optimize the newly registered frame
- Global mode: optimize all registered frames (except reference frame)

This improves stability during incremental registration phase.

commit.message:
fix: correzione k Newton raffreddamento da 1.0 a 0.5 h⁻¹

k=1.0 era fisicamente sbagliato per impasto in aria (prediceva
quasi 19°C dopo solo 4h da frigo). k=0.5 è più corretto per pallina
in contenitore: dà ~6-7h di appretto e temperature realistiche.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

docs: restore full inline comments to config.yaml; preserve comments on update

- config.yaml: restored all per-parameter explanations that were lost when
  update_config_yaml() called yaml.dump() (PyYAML silently strips comments).
  Every parameter now has an inline comment explaining its meaning, units,
  calibration guidance, and scientific rationale.

- generate_thessaloniki.py: replace yaml.safe_load() + yaml.dump() approach
  in update_config_yaml() with a targeted regex patch that rewrites only the
  config_file and binary lines, leaving all comments intact.

commit.message:
feat: route frontend through API gateway instead of direct tunnel URLs

Frontend now fetches /v1/models to determine online models and sends all
self-hosted requests to the unified gateway endpoint. The service key
(e.g. "gemma") is used as the model field in the request body so the
gateway can route to the correct tunnel.

Raw tunnel URLs are no longer exposed to the browser; GET /tunnels and
GET /tunnel/:model remain available for admin/debugging purposes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
design-system: Rocky Mountain alpine design system with Tailwind v4

Build complete reusable component library with dark alpine tones:
- globals.css: @theme inline with granite/forest/alpine/copper/snow/ridge palette,
  custom animations, glass-nav, mountain gradients, decorative-line utility
- Button: primary/secondary/ghost/copper/outline variants, 3 sizes
- Card: service card with icon, hover lift, gradient accent, tag badges
- SectionHeader: centered with decorative copper gradient line
- Navigation: sticky, transparent-to-solid on scroll, services dropdown, mobile menu
- Footer: 4-column (brand+contact, services, company, service area), treeline SVG
- HeroSection: full-height mountain gradient with badge, dual CTAs, mountain range SVG
- ServiceGrid: 4-service responsive grid with typed icons per service category
- ContactCTA: full-width ridge gradient banner with mountain peaks divider
- TestimonialCard: quote card with initials avatar and company attribution
- MountainSVG: 6 decorative elements (peaks, range, treeline, mountain icon, drone icon, divider)

All components TypeScript-strict, responsive, use Playfair Display headings + Inter body.

commit.message:
Fix D3 Roadmap iPhone mobile compatibility

Remove non-standard CSS zoom hacks (compounded to 0.78x at 375px making
text unreadable), add comprehensive mobile CSS at 480px/375px breakpoints
covering all 11 tabs, and add CSS class hooks to JS-rendered modals.

Key fixes: scrollable tab strip with fade indicators, tables scroll
inside container (no body scroll), 16px inputs prevent iOS auto-zoom,
44px touch targets, safe-area padding for notched iPhones, monthly
planner horizontal scroll instead of zoom.

commit.message:
confluence-mdx: blockquote 내 문장 분리 시 줄바꿈 누락을 수정합니다 (#883)

## Summary
- `MultiLineParser`의 blockquote 처리에서 `> ` prefix 추가 시 `\n`이 누락되어, 여러 문장이
한 줄로 이어 붙는 버그를 수정합니다.
- `TestBlockquoteSentenceSplit` 테스트케이스를 추가합니다.

## Test plan
- [x] `pytest tests/test_split_into_sentences.py` 2건 통과
- [x] `pytest tests/` 전체 통과 (781 passed)
- [x] `npm test` 전체 통과 (74 tests)

commit.message:
feat: Use pa: prefix for all commands to avoid conflicts

- All commands now use pa: prefix (e.g., pa:help, pa:fix, pa:status)
- Prevents conflicts with other AI agent tools
- Updated PROAGENTS.md with new command format
- Updated init command output and README section
- Updated documentation prompts

Commands:
  pa:help           - Show all commands
  pa:feature "name" - Start new feature
  pa:fix "bug"      - Quick bug fix
  pa:status         - Show progress
  pa:release        - Generate release notes
  pa:qa             - Quality check
  pa:test           - Run tests
  pa:doc            - Generate docs

is covered by the existing Actions permission.

feat: real-time counter updates via SSE + immediate sync on repo add

Broadcast sync_complete SSE events after each repo sync so the frontend
can invalidate queries immediately instead of waiting for the polling
cycle. New repos trigger a background sync on add so counters populate
within seconds.

commit.message:
Add trust fund code search & Yahoo Finance JP price fetching

Problem: TRUST asset price refresh was skipped when associ_fund_cd was
unset (toushin-lib requires its own internal codes, not easily discoverable).

Solution: Use Yahoo Finance Japan as primary price source for TRUST assets.

price_fetcher.py:
- search_trust_fund(q): searches Yahoo Finance Japan, returns [{code, name}]
- fetch_yahoo_jp_fund_price(code): scrapes current NAV from YJ fund page
- fetch_yahoo_jp_fund_history(code, years): paginates YJ history page
- refresh_all_prices / refresh_all_historical_prices: try YJ first for TRUST,
  fall back to toushin-lib CSV on failure

api.py:
- GET /trust-fund-search?q=... endpoint (proxies search_trust_fund)

index.html:
- editFundCode() replaced with modal dialog featuring fund name search:
  - type name → click 検索 → results show code+name → click to fill
  - or type code directly → save

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: appretto temperature uses ambientTemp instead of hardcoded 22°C

La temperatura dell'appretto era fissa a 22°C per napoletana/teglia e
24°C per pane, ignorando la temperatura ambiente impostata dall'utente.
Ora tutte le fasi di appretto usano ambientTemp (temperatura reale).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

docs: add agent-first CLI development rules (#73)

Add docs/cli/agent-dx.md with CLI design guidelines for agent consumers:
- JSON-first output (stdout=JSON, stderr=human messages)
- Input hardening against hallucinations (path traversal, control chars)
- dry-run for mutating commands
- Environment variable auth (no browser redirects)
- Context window discipline (--limit, --fields)

Add CLI Rules summary to CLAUDE.md.

Based on: "You Need to Rewrite Your CLI for AI Agents" by Justin Poehnelt (Google)

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add silhouette visualisation and LangSAM auto-segmentation to refine_frame0
